parameters.text: Панель управления ElevenLabs agents.  Выберите действие:

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        elevenlabs_agent_id,
        display_name,
        0 AS is_empty_marker
    FROM elevenlabs_agents
    WHERE owner_telegram_user_id = {{$json.telegram_user_id}}
      AND is_active = 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        NULL AS elevenlabs_agent_id,
        NULL AS display_name,
        1 AS is_empty_marker
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM elevenlabs_agents
        WHERE owner_telegram_user_id = {{$json.telegram_user_id}}
          AND is_active = 1
    )
) AS agents_result
ORDER BY is_empty_marker ASC, display_name ASC;

SELECT
    elevenlabs_agent_id,
    display_name,
    1 AS access_granted
FROM elevenlabs_agents
WHERE elevenlabs_agent_id = '{{$json.selected_elevenlabs_agent_id}}'
  AND owner_telegram_user_id = {{$json.telegram_user_id}}
  AND is_active = 1

UNION ALL

SELECT
    '{{$json.selected_elevenlabs_agent_id}}' AS elevenlabs_agent_id,
    NULL AS display_name,
    0 AS access_granted
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM elevenlabs_agents
    WHERE elevenlabs_agent_id = '{{$json.selected_elevenlabs_agent_id}}'
      AND owner_telegram_user_id = {{$json.telegram_user_id}}
      AND is_active = 1
)

ORDER BY access_granted DESC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO user_sessions (
    telegram_user_id,
    selected_elevenlabs_agent_id,
    current_action
)
VALUES (
    {{$('Нормализатор').first().json.telegram_user_id}},
    '{{$json.elevenlabs_agent_id}}',
    'idle'
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
    selected_elevenlabs_agent_id = VALUES(selected_elevenlabs_agent_id),
    current_action = 'idle',
    updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

SELECT
    s.telegram_user_id,
    s.selected_elevenlabs_agent_id,
    s.current_action,
    a.display_name,
    CASE
        WHEN a.elevenlabs_agent_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS access_granted
FROM user_sessions s
LEFT JOIN elevenlabs_agents a
    ON a.owner_telegram_user_id = s.telegram_user_id
   AND a.elevenlabs_agent_id = s.selected_elevenlabs_agent_id
   AND a.is_active = 1
WHERE s.telegram_user_id = {{$json.telegram_user_id}}
LIMIT 1;

assignments.name: instruction_text
assignments.value: ={{    $('Нормализатор').first().json.callback_data === 'action:update_prompt'     ? 'Отправьте новый prompt для выбранного агента.'     : $('Нормализатор').first().json.callback_data === 'action:update_welcome_message'       ? 'Отправьте новый welcome message для выбранного агента.'       : 'Отправьте новый текст knowledge base / content для выбранного агента.' }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
    s.telegram_user_id,
    s.selected_elevenlabs_agent_id,
    s.current_action,
    a.display_name,
    CASE
        WHEN a.elevenlabs_agent_id IS NOT NULL
         AND s.current_action <> 'idle'
        THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS can_update
FROM user_sessions s
LEFT JOIN elevenlabs_agents a
    ON a.owner_telegram_user_id = s.telegram_user_id
   AND a.elevenlabs_agent_id = s.selected_elevenlabs_agent_id
   AND a.is_active = 1
WHERE s.telegram_user_id = {{$json.telegram_user_id}}
LIMIT 1;

parameters.text: Сначала выберите агента и действие, которое хотите изменить.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO update_logs (
    telegram_user_id,
    elevenlabs_agent_id,
    action_type,
    status,
    new_value_preview,
    http_status_code,
    error_message,
    elevenlabs_response_json
)
VALUES (
    {{ $('Собрать данные для ElevenLabs update').first().json.telegram_user_id }},
    '{{ $('Собрать данные для ElevenLabs update').first().json.elevenlabs_agent_id }}',
    '{{ $('Собрать данные для ElevenLabs update').first().json.action_type }}',
    'success',
    '{{ $('Собрать данные для ElevenLabs update').first().json.new_value_preview.replace(/\\/g, "\\\\").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    200,
    NULL,
    JSON_OBJECT(
        'ok', true,
        'provider', 'elevenlabs',
        'note', 'Full ElevenLabs response omitted in MVP log'
    )
);

UPDATE user_sessions
SET
    current_action = 'idle',
    updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE telegram_user_id = {{ $('Собрать данные для ElevenLabs update').first().json.telegram_user_id }};

parameters.text: ={{ $('Собрать данные для ElevenLabs update').first().json.success_text + '\n\nГотово. Можно выбрать следующее действие.' }}
